docs.title: About
docs.text:
You can create a table using dashes and piping. You can use syntax to add formatting.

Feature Supported Notes Headings Yes Use # or ## Tables Yes Simple pipe-based format Code blocks Yes Use triple backticks (```)

docs.title: This is a heading
docs.text:
1. Add some steps.
  2. Add more steps with things to click on.
  3. Add some bullets too
  4. Add more bullets
